policies.name: Minimum Driver Rating
policies.description: Drivers must maintain minimum rating to stay active
policies.notification: Your rating has dropped below 4.5. Please improve to continue driving.

policies.name: Minimum Trip Requirement
policies.description: Drivers must complete minimum trips per week
policies.notification: Complete 20 trips this week to stay active.

policies.name: Insurance Verification
policies.description: Only drivers with active insurance can receive rides
policies.notification: Your insurance has expired. Please renew to continue.

policies.name: Background Check
policies.description: Drivers must pass annual background re-check
policies.notification: Please complete your annual background verification.

policies.name: Vehicle Fitness
policies.description: Only vehicles with valid fitness certificates can operate
policies.notification: Your vehicle fitness certificate has expired.

policies.name: Maximum Wait Time
policies.description: Auto-cancel if no driver found within 5 minutes
policies.notification: No drivers available. Your booking has been cancelled.

policies.name: Passenger Cancellation Fee
policies.description: Charge if passenger cancels after driver assigned

policies.name: Driver Cancellation Fee
policies.description: Charge if driver cancels without reason
policies.notification: Cancellation fee of ₹100 deducted from your earnings.

policies.name: Night Charge
policies.description: Additional charge for rides between 10 PM - 6 AM

policies.name: Payment Pre-authorization
policies.description: Block payment method if insufficient balance
policies.notification: Please add funds to your wallet.

policies.name: Safety Alert Threshold
policies.description: Trigger safety check if unusual route deviation
